hibernate-mapping.query: Select billingDetail from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.BillingDetail as billingDetail, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where billingDetail.Id= finTxn.BillingDetail.Id and finTxn.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id=mmTxn.Id and finTxn.Company.Id=mmTxn.Company.Id and mmTxn.InitiationDate = :currentDate and finTxn.SettlementDate >= :currentDate and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd = :txnStateCd and (billingDetail.TaxExceptionInd != 0 or billingDetail.TaxComputedDate != null and billingDetail.TaxComputedDate < :vertexUpdateDate) order by billingDetail.PayrollRun
Select d from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.BillingDetail as d where d.PayrollRun.Company = :company and d.ItemSku = :sku and d.TaxAmount > 0.0 order by d.ModifiedDate desc
